_output_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — target filesystem path for the marshalled artifact.

_phase_status.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — workflow state (drives C4 requirements-table branch).

field_name.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Zod field path emitted in this column.

header_text.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — text printed in the header row.

width.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — preferred column width in Excel units.

type_hint.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Excel cell-type hint for the marshaller.

required.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — whether marshaller should error on null.

items.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — single column-layout instruction (first-class per C5).

_columns_plan.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — optional layout instructions (first-class per C5).

field_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — dotted path within the phase schema (e.g., "rows[].math_derivation").

introduced_in.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — schema semver where this field was added.

rationale.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — reviewer-facing reason the insertion was made.

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — KB file that motivated the insertion, if any.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — methodology insertion (first-class per C5).

_insertions.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — optional methodology insertions applied to this phase (first-class per C5).

phase_number.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — methodology phase number (0-18) per F13/4 Decision Matrix module.

phase_slug.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — URL-safe slug (e.g., "requirements-table"). Also the xlsx sheet slug.

phase_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — human-facing phase title (e.g., "Phase 6 — Extract Requirements Table").

schema_version.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — Zod schema semver (e.g., "1.0.0") for drift-detection.

project_id.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — parent project id; keys workbook + PDF filename.

project_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — project display name; rendered at top and used as xlsx workbook title.

author.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — emitting agent or human reviewer identifier.

generator.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — tool that produced this artifact (e.g., "product-helper@0.1.0").

revision.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — monotonic revision counter per (project, phase).

bridge_version.description: x-ui-surface=internal:bridge-version — stable contract tag M5 (future HoQ sweep) validates against.

option_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Selected Option > Header — single-letter option id from M3 Phase 11 `alternatives_to_compare[]` (A, B, ...).

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:Selected Option > Header — option name (e.g., "Postgres with read replicas").

weighted_total.description: x-ui-surface=section:Selected Option > Scoring — final Σ(weight_i × normalized_score_i) for this option.

margin_over_runner_up.description: x-ui-surface=section:Selected Option > Scoring — absolute gap to the second-place option (sensitivity signal).

selection_rationale.description: x-ui-surface=section:Selected Option > Rationale — one paragraph explaining why this option won and what trade-offs were accepted.

selected_option.description: x-ui-surface=section:Selected Option — winning alternative with weighted total + margin.

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:Criterion Weights > Row — PC name (convenience for M5 renderers).

weight.description: x-ui-surface=section:Criterion Weights > Row — normalized weight (Σ all weights = 1.0).

formula.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — LaTeX-like or plain-English formula (e.g., "p95 = base + queueing_delay(λ, μ)").

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — KB filename (matches softwareArchRefSchema or "inline") that sourced the formula.

kb_section.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — optional heading/anchor within the KB file (e.g., "§P95 envelope").

result.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — computed value, if the formula is evaluated at generation time.

math_derivation.description: x-ui-surface=section:Criterion Weights > Row > Math — REQUIRED derivation of the weight value (M5 consumes this for EC-importance transfer).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Criterion Weights — per-PC weight with math, projected for M5 HoQ importance-rating.

criteria_weights.description: x-ui-surface=page:/projects/[id]/system-design/decision-matrix/bridge — per-PC weights feeding M5 EC importance rating.

criterion_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row — stable PC-NN identifier.

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row — human-facing PC name (e.g., "p95 API latency", "write throughput").

category.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row — grouping for DM normalization + QFD EC mapping (M4 Phase 17).

direction.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row — scoring direction; controls M4 Phase 9 normalization sign.

measure_type.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row — direct measure (numeric formula) or scaled measure (1-5 rubric anchors in M4 Phase 5).

unit.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row — unit for the target (e.g., "ms", "%", "req/s", "score").

target_value.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row — numeric target (direct measure) or rubric level (scaled measure).

min_acceptable.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row — absolute minimum; below this the option is rejected regardless of weighted score.

measurement_method.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row — how the value is actually measured (e.g., "k6 load test, 30min steady-state, p95").

formula.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — LaTeX-like or plain-English formula (e.g., "p95 = base + queueing_delay(λ, μ)").

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — KB filename (matches softwareArchRefSchema or "inline") that sourced the formula.

kb_section.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — optional heading/anchor within the KB file (e.g., "§P95 envelope").

result.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — computed value, if the formula is evaluated at generation time.

math_derivation.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row > Math — **REQUIRED per master §4.5.4 Step 3.** Formula + KB source must cite how the target was derived (Little's Law, queueing math, error-budget math, etc.).

source_function_block_ids.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row > Provenance — FFBD block IDs from M3 Phase 11 `functions_flat_list` that drive this criterion (≥1 required — PCs are always traceable to functions).

suggested_kb_reference.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row > Rationale — optional KB file grounding this criterion (reuses M2 12-ref enum).

artifact.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — artifact identifier within the phase (e.g., "UC03.R02", "PC-01").

relationship.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — kind of link to the source artifact.

note.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — reviewer-facing context for the link.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — cross-phase reference (also_appears_in / source_ucbd unified per C11).

also_appears_in.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row > Provenance — cross-phase references (e.g., originating M2 Phase 8 constant that anchors the target).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Performance Criteria > Row — one PC with required math_derivation, direction, and function-block provenance (master §4.5.4 Step 3).

performance_criteria.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM→QFD Bridge > PCs — full PC specs carried forward so M5 can derive EC targets.

criterion_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Row — PC this measure binds to (must match a PC-NN in M4 Phase 3 `criteria[]`).

measure_type.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Row — must match M4 Phase 3 `measure_type` for the same criterion_id.

formula.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Direct — measurement formula (e.g., "p95 = sort(samples)[0.95 * n]").

measurement_tool.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Direct — tool used to measure (e.g., "k6", "Datadog APM", "custom load-gen").

sample_size_min.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Direct — minimum sample size for a valid measurement.

formula.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — LaTeX-like or plain-English formula (e.g., "p95 = base + queueing_delay(λ, μ)").

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — KB filename (matches softwareArchRefSchema or "inline") that sourced the formula.

kb_section.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — optional heading/anchor within the KB file (e.g., "§P95 envelope").

result.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — computed value, if the formula is evaluated at generation time.

math_derivation.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Direct > Math — derivation of the target from upstream constants (required so direct measures stay KB-grounded).

direct_measure.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Row — populated when measure_type = "direct".

level.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Anchors — rubric level (1 = worst, 5 = best; direction-aware).

value.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Anchors — **REQUIRED numeric anchor per master §4.5.4 Step 5.** The measured value the scoring team uses to decide "this option scores 3". Must come from §10 Typical Constants or a domain KB.

unit.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Anchors — unit for the anchor value (must match the PC unit).

description.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Anchors — one-sentence reviewer description (e.g., "Level 3: p95 latency between 100-250ms under expected load").

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Anchors > Rationale — **REQUIRED citation per master §4.5.4 Step 5.** KB filename (e.g., "api-design-sys-design-kb.md") or "§10-typical-constants" for the industry benchmark that anchored this level.

kb_section.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Anchors > Rationale — optional anchor heading within the KB file (e.g., "§p95-internal-latency-targets").

kb_reference.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Anchors > Rationale — optional enum match for the KB file (reuses M2 12-ref set when anchor cites a canonical KB).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Anchors — one of 5 rubric levels for a scaled criterion (master §4.5.4 Step 5: numeric + KB-sourced).

anchors.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Scaled — exactly 5 anchors (one per level 1-5).

anchor_monotonicity_check.description: x-ui-surface=internal:rubric-validation — assert anchor values are monotonic in the PC direction. Validator sets this true at emission time; false indicates a pitfall flag for M4 Phase 4.

scaled_measure.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Row — populated when measure_type = "scaled".

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Direct/Scaled Measures > Row — per-PC measure entry (direct formula OR scaled rubric).

measures.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM→QFD Bridge > Measures — direct/scaled measure entries (M5 HoQ EC target-setting needs rubric anchors).

raw_score.description: x-ui-surface=section:Scoring Snapshot > Cell — raw measured value before normalization.

normalized_score.description: x-ui-surface=section:Scoring Snapshot > Cell — normalized to [0,1] per M4 Phase 9 method.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Scoring Snapshot > Cell — one matrix cell.

cells.description: x-ui-surface=section:Scoring Snapshot > Matrix — every (criterion, option) cell (≥12 = min 6 criteria × 2 options per methodology §11).

weighted_totals_per_option.description: x-ui-surface=section:Scoring Snapshot > Totals — per-option weighted total (option_id → Σ weighted_contribution).

scoring_snapshot.description: x-ui-surface=section:Scoring Snapshot — full DM matrix snapshot for traceability + sensitivity analysis.

description: x-ui-surface=page-header — base phase envelope extended by every Module 2 phase.
title: Phase17DmToQfdBridge
